---
title: "SEEA Implementation -- AFE Region"
format:
  dashboard:
    scrolling: true
    nav-buttons:
      - icon: house
        href: ../index.qmd
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false

library(tidyverse)
library(gt)
afe2025 <- readRDS("outputs/assessment/AFE_assessment_2025.RDS")

stage_palette <- c(
  "Not implementing" = "#cccccc",
  "Stage I"          = "#8ecae6",
  "Stage II"         = "#219ebc",
  "Stage III"        = "#023047"
)

# Implementing countries metadata, ordered by compiled count
implementing_meta <- afe2025 |>
  filter(`Implementing the SEEA` == "Yes") |>
  distinct(
    `Country or area`,
    `Stage of implementation (SDG 15.9.1b)`,
    `Imputed data`,
    `Responding institution`,
    `Website(s)`,
    Links
  ) |>
  left_join(
    afe2025 |>
      filter(Compiled == "Yes") |>
      count(`Country or area`, name = "n_compiled"),
    by = "Country or area"
  ) |>
  mutate(n_compiled = replace_na(n_compiled, 0L)) |>
  arrange(desc(n_compiled))

implementing_countries <- implementing_meta$`Country or area`

# Account order for heatmap (by frequency)
account_order <- afe2025 |>
  filter(Compiled == "Yes") |>
  count(Account, sort = TRUE) |>
  pull(Account)
```

# Overview

## Row {height="20%"}

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Countries Assessed"
list(
  icon  = "globe-americas",
  color = "#219ebc",
  value = n_distinct(afe2025$`Country or area`)
)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Implementing SEEA"
list(
  icon  = "check-circle",
  color = "#023047",
  value = length(implementing_countries)
)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Accounts Tracked"
list(
  icon  = "list-check",
  color = "#8ecae6",
  value = n_distinct(afe2025$Account)
)
```

```{r}
#| content: valuebox
#| title: "Account Compilations"
list(
  icon  = "bar-chart",
  color = "#ffb703",
  value = afe2025 |> filter(Compiled == "Yes") |> nrow()
)
```

## Row {height="80%"}

### Col {width="50%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Implementation Stage by Country"
#| fig-width: 6
#| fig-height: 5

implementing_meta |>
  mutate(
    `Country or area` = fct_reorder(`Country or area`, n_compiled),
    stage = factor(
      `Stage of implementation (SDG 15.9.1b)`,
      levels = c("Stage I", "Stage II", "Stage III")
    )
  ) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = n_compiled, y = `Country or area`, colour = stage)) +
  geom_segment(
    aes(x = 0, xend = n_compiled, yend = `Country or area`),
    linewidth = 0.6
  ) +
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  scale_colour_manual(values = stage_palette, name = NULL) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 0:6, expand = expansion(mult = c(0, 0.1))) +
  labs(x = "Compiled accounts", y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 10) +
  theme(
    legend.position    = "bottom",
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor   = element_blank()
  )
```

### Col {width="50%"}

```{r}
#| title: "Account Coverage of Implementers"
#| fig-width: 7
#| fig-height: 5

afe2025 |>
  filter(`Country or area` %in% implementing_countries) |>
  mutate(
    Account           = factor(Account, levels = rev(account_order)),
    `Country or area` = factor(`Country or area`, levels = implementing_countries),
    grp               = str_remove(`Account Group`, "^SEEA ") |> str_wrap(18),
    compiled_flag     = Compiled == "Yes"
  ) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = `Country or area`, y = Account, fill = compiled_flag)) +
  geom_tile(colour = "white", linewidth = 0.3) +
  facet_grid(
    rows   = vars(grp),
    scales = "free_y",
    space  = "free_y",
    switch = "y"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("TRUE" = "#219ebc", "FALSE" = "#eeeeee"),
    labels = c("TRUE" = "Compiled", "FALSE" = "Not compiled"),
    name   = NULL
  ) +
  scale_x_discrete(position = "top") +
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 8) +
  theme(
    axis.text.x       = element_text(angle = 35, hjust = 0, vjust = 0, size = 7),
    axis.text.y       = element_text(size = 7),
    strip.text.y.left = element_text(angle = 0, hjust = 1, size = 7, face = "bold"),
    strip.placement   = "outside",
    legend.position   = "bottom",
    panel.grid        = element_blank()
  )
```

# Country Profiles

## Row {.tabset}

```{r}
#| output: asis
#| echo: false

for (ctry in implementing_countries) {

  meta   <- implementing_meta |> filter(`Country or area` == ctry)
  stage  <- meta$`Stage of implementation (SDG 15.9.1b)`
  inst   <- meta$`Responding institution`
  n_comp <- meta$n_compiled
  source <- if_else(meta$`Imputed data` == "Yes", "Imputed", "Self-reported")

  compiled_accounts <- afe2025 |>
    filter(`Country or area` == ctry, Compiled == "Yes") |>
    select(`Account Group`, Account)

  cat("###", ctry, "\n\n")

  # Info cards row
  cat("::: {.card}\n")
  cat(paste0("**Stage (SDG 15.9.1b):** ", stage, "  \n"))
  cat(paste0("**Compiled accounts:** ", n_comp, "  \n"))
  cat(paste0("**Data source:** ", source, "  \n"))
  cat(paste0("**Responding institution:** ", inst, "\n"))
  cat(":::\n\n")

  # Compiled accounts table
  if (nrow(compiled_accounts) > 0) {
    tbl <- compiled_accounts |>
      gt() |>
      cols_label(`Account Group` = "Group", Account = "Account") |>
      tab_style(
        style     = cell_text(weight = "bold"),
        locations = cells_column_labels()
      ) |>
      tab_options(table.width = pct(100), data_row.padding = px(4))
    print(tbl)
  } else {
    cat("No accounts compiled yet.\n\n")
  }
}
```
